# Ghost Continuum
> Open-source Living Digital Immune System - v3.0 OMEGA ASCENDANT. Holographic Command Nexus, NSGA-II genomes, multi-plane polymorphic deception, Home Shield, Merkle forensics. Defensive only. Local-first. Zero core npm deps.

Ghost Continuum (https://ghost.jonbailey.xyz) is a local-first defensive security platform by Pitchfork-and-Torch. Deception traps breed via genetic algorithms, personas morph at runtime, and engagements are sealed in a Merkle ledger. Sensor planes orchestrate Ghost LAN honeypots, Cloudflare edge tripwires, audit, narrative weave, phantom mesh, deep veil, mirage core, and Trench Coat privacy. Node.js 18+, zero npm dependencies in the core stack.

Last reviewed: 2026-07-23
Social preview (OG/Twitter 1200x630): https://ghost.jonbailey.xyz/share-card.jpg

## Citation-ready one-liner
Ghost Continuum is an open-source polymorphic honeypot and defensive deception engine: traps evolve via NSGA-II, personas morph at runtime, and evidence is Merkle-sealed - for authorized targets on your own network only. Version 3.0 OMEGA ASCENDANT adds an immersive public Command interface and Home Shield path.

## Quick answers (AEO)
- **What is Ghost Continuum?** Living Digital Immune System - polymorphic honeypots and edge tripwires that evolve, morph, contain, and seal evidence.
- **Is it offensive?** No. Defensive only. Authorized targets on your own network.
- **How do I install?** `git clone https://github.com/Pitchfork-and-Torch/ghost-continuum.git && cd ghost-continuum && npm run setup && npm start`
- **Latest version?** 3.0.0 OMEGA ASCENDANT - https://github.com/Pitchfork-and-Torch/ghost-continuum/releases/latest
- **Where is it live?** Landing https://ghost.jonbailey.xyz · Command Nexus preview https://ghost.jonbailey.xyz/hub/
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/Pitchfork-and-Torch/ghost-continuum
- **What is Command Nexus?** Holographic operator dashboard with 3D intrusion map, sensor planes, LIVE/DEMO modes, Home Shield, forensic replay.
- **What is Home Shield?** Family-friendly and home-lab defense controls: wizard, kid mode, quiet hours, alerts, PWA, weekly report.
- **What does the dashboard look like?** https://ghost.jonbailey.xyz/hub/command-nexus.png
- **Related cloak layer?** Trench Coat multi-hop privacy cloak: https://trenchcoat.jonbailey.xyz/
- **Related radio OS?** GrokLink OS: https://github.com/Pitchfork-and-Torch/GrokLink-OS · https://groklink.jonbailey.xyz/
- **Related fashion concept?** AXIOM (Optimus wardrobe): https://axiom.jonbailey.xyz/

## Core capabilities
- Deception Genome - classic GA + NSGA-II, fitness scoring, runtime morph (no eval)
- Ghost LAN - polymorphic LAN honeypots (NAS, router, camera personas)
- Edge plane - Cloudflare Worker tripwires, sentinel script, KV honeypot rotation
- Command Nexus - holographic 3D intrusion map, forensic time machine, Ghost Voice, NL queries
- Trust fabric - Merkle ledger, STIX/TAXII 2.1, sealed incident bundles
- Extended planes - Phantom Mesh, Deep Veil, Mirage Core, Trench Coat
- Home Shield - wizard profiles, kid mode, quiet hours, device trust, notifications, PWA
- Public site v3 - interactive planes explorer, client-side Nexus lifecycle demo, efficacy gauges

## Install
```bash
git clone https://github.com/Pitchfork-and-Torch/ghost-continuum.git
cd ghost-continuum
npm run setup
npm start
```
Command Hub: http://127.0.0.1:30000 (after install)
